framework_selection.selection_reason: Japanese listed company with integrated and sustainability reports.

scoring_audit.report_boundary_policy: latest integrated report plus sustainability report
audit_notes: Same 0-10 cap rules applied to every tag.

top_strengths: Clear value creation narrative tied to customer problems and strategic assets.
Human capital and intangible asset initiatives are connected to strategy.
top_gaps: Capital allocation link to non-financial drivers is weak.
Governance accountability for materiality is not decision-grade.
comparability_warnings: Report boundary differs from peer sustainability reports.

report_sources.selection_reason: Official company PDF from report library.
Official company PDF from sustainability archive.

scores.label: Value creation story
scores.definition: Whether the company explains how business model, strategy, resources, stakeholder relationships, and outcomes connect as a causal story.
scores.reason: Narrative explains the path from customer needs to strategic assets and outcomes, but downside trade-offs are limited.
score_caps_applied: No explicit negative/tradeoff evidence: score not raised above 8

scores.label: Materiality
scores.definition: Whether important value drivers and sustainability-related issues are identified, prioritized, and linked to enterprise value.
scores.reason: Material themes are ranked and linked to strategy, but financial effect ranges are not disclosed.

scores.label: Business model and outcomes
scores.definition: Whether inputs, business activities, outputs, outcomes, and key stakeholders are described in a connected model.
scores.reason: Business model shows inputs and outcomes, with partial stakeholder outcome disclosure.
calibration_notes: Kept below high anchor because outcome data is partial.

evidence.excerpt: The company links customer productivity issues to proprietary process technology, employee skills, and recurring service revenue.
The report identifies climate transition, human capital, and supply-chain resilience as priority issues with medium-term targets.
